title: Window Functions
description: Window functions (MySQL 8.0+) untuk analisis data lanjutan.

commands.name: ROW_NUMBER
commands.title: ROW_NUMBER
commands.description: Memberikan nomor urut unik ke setiap baris dalam partisi.
commands.syntax: ROW_NUMBER() OVER ([PARTITION BY col] ORDER BY col)

commands.name: RANK-DENSE_RANK
commands.title: RANK / DENSE_RANK
commands.syntax: RANK() / DENSE_RANK() OVER ([PARTITION BY col] ORDER BY col)
commands.examples:
-- RANK: 1, 2, 2, 4 (ada gap)
-- DENSE_RANK: 1, 2, 2, 3 (tanpa gap)
SELECT name, price,
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY price DESC) AS price_rank,
  DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY price DESC) AS dense_rank
FROM products;

-- Top 3 produk per kategori
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT name, category_id, price,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category_id ORDER BY price DESC) AS rnk
  FROM products
) ranked WHERE rnk <= 3;

commands.name: LAG-LEAD
commands.title: LAG / LEAD
commands.description: Mengakses baris sebelum/sesudah baris saat ini.
commands.syntax: LAG(col, offset, default) / LEAD(col, offset, default) OVER (...)
commands.examples:
-- Perbandingan dengan bulan sebelumnya
SELECT month, revenue,
  LAG(revenue, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS prev_month,
  revenue - LAG(revenue, 1) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS growth
FROM monthly_sales;

-- Selisih waktu antar order
SELECT id, created_at,
  LEAD(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at) AS next_order,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, created_at, LEAD(created_at) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at)) AS days_between
FROM orders;

commands.name: SUM-OVER
commands.title: Running Total (SUM OVER)
commands.syntax: SUM(col) OVER (ORDER BY col ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
commands.examples:
-- Running total revenue
SELECT date, revenue,
  SUM(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY date) AS running_total
FROM daily_sales;

-- Moving average 7 hari
SELECT date, revenue,
  AVG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS moving_avg_7d
FROM daily_sales;

commands.name: NTILE
commands.title: NTILE / PERCENT_RANK
commands.description: Membagi data ke dalam n bucket atau menghitung persentil.
commands.syntax: NTILE(n) OVER (ORDER BY col) / PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY col)
commands.examples:
-- Bagi customer ke 4 quartile berdasarkan spending
SELECT username, total_spent,
  NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY total_spent DESC) AS quartile
FROM (
  SELECT user_id, u.username, SUM(total) AS total_spent
  FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
  GROUP BY user_id
) spending;

SELECT name, price,
  PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY price) AS pct_rank
FROM products;
